_note: Researched Saudi monthly salary ranges (SAR) by career level, used to build career-path ladders (never estimated). Each field lists the sources used. Cross-checked against market knowledge; public aggregators (PayScale/Glassdoor 'average') that mixed annual vs monthly were discarded. Figures are gross monthly base, Riyadh/Jeddah, mid-to-large employers; smaller cities/agencies sit ~15-30% lower, giga-projects and government higher.

sources: Hays Saudi Arabia Salary Guide (Social Media Manager 30,000 to 40,000)
Cooper Fitch KSA Salary Guide 2025/2026 (marketing and director tiers)
Salaryexplorer Saudi Arabia (PR, social, creative director)
ERI / SalaryExpert Riyadh (video editor, events, creative director)
media_marketing_content.caveats: Director cell = 'Head of / Lead' ceiling for individual-contributor roles; full C-suite band only for Creative/Marketing Director. Events/sports media and government/giga-projects pay a premium. Lowest-confidence rows: Media Operations Coordinator and Brand Manager (thin public benchmarks).
